content: On macOS Tahoe/Sequoia, unsigned or ad-hoc-signed apps downloaded from the internet cannot be opened via right-click bypass anymore (removed in 15.1). User must attempt to open, dismiss the block dialog, then go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > scroll to bottom > click 'Open Anyway' > authenticate with password/Touch ID. The Open Anyway button expires after about an hour if unused. Ad-hoc signing (free, no Developer Program needed) makes the block dialog slightly less alarming than fully unsigned but does not remove this flow.
